---
title: "Proximal Descent for Stable Decision-Focused Training with Inexact Surrogate Gradients"
authors:
  - "Shunyu Wu"
  - "J. Wang"
  - "J. Rao"
  - "X. Xiao"
  - "H. Cai"
year: 2025
venue: "NeurIPS"
status: "under-review"
type: "first-author"
doi: ""
url: ""
keywords:
  - "decision-focused learning"
  - "proximal descent"
  - "surrogate gradients"
selected: true
toc: false
---

**Status:** Under Review (NeurIPS 2025)

This work introduces proximal update schemes to improve robustness of DFL optimization when surrogate gradients are inexact.
